results.name: ACT Legislation Register (Parliamentary Counsel's Office)
results.rationale: ACT legislative archive—canonical T1 primary source. Covers all ACT Acts & subordinate laws incl. transport, environment, energy. Freight impact via planning, environment, transport regulation.

results.name: Australian Maritime Safety Authority (AMSA)
results.rationale: AMSA is canonical maritime regulator; governs vessel safety, emissions (NOx, GHG, sulphur fuel), dangerous goods, port operations—operationally affects maritime freight & cargo transport.

results.name: Hawaii State Energy Office (HSEO)
results.rationale: State energy office with canonical regulatory & policy mandate. Covers alternative fuels, fleet procurement, decarbonization—directly operationally relevant to freight via fuel standards, EV adoption,

results.name: Transport Canada
results.rationale: Federal transport regulator; primary jurisdiction over dangerous goods, marine, rail, aviation, road safety—all operationally impact freight. Canonical regulator.

results.name: NT Legislation – Northern Territory Legislation Website
results.rationale: Canonical NT legislative archive hosting Acts, bills, subordinate legislation. Primary regulator publication for jurisdiction. Freight relevance moderate—general legislation portal, not pure-sustainab

results.name: Iowa DOT – Freight Planning & Maps/Data Tools
results.rationale: State DOT freight planning portal with canonical regulatory authority over multimodal freight systems, corridors, and economic competitiveness planning.

results.name: Montana Legislature – Montana Code Annotated (MCA)
results.rationale: Montana legislative code archive. T1 canonical primary source hosting statutes across all domains including Title 60 (Highways/Transportation), Title 61 (Motor Vehicles), Title 69 (Public Utilities),

results.name: DPNR – Division of Environmental Protection
results.rationale: USVI territorial environmental regulator with air, water, waste, and coastal mandates. Vessel registration and port-adjacent authority support freight operations indirectly.

results.name: New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT)
results.rationale: NYSDOT canonical truck/motor carrier safety regulator. Directly governs commercial vehicle ops, hazmat, household goods transport. Primary regulatory authority.

results.name: Maryland Department of the Environment (MDE) – Air & Climate Change Program
results.rationale: State-level primary regulator with climate/emissions mandate. Direct sustainability relevance. Indirect freight impact via building decarbonization, emissions inventory, and climate policy that may af

results.name: South Carolina Department of Environmental Services (SCDES) – Bureau of Air Quality
results.rationale: Canonical state air-quality regulator with direct jurisdiction over emissions, air permits, hazardous air pollutants. Operationally affects freight via emission standards, vehicle/fleet air compliance

results.name: Kansas Secretary of State – Kansas Register (Official Gazette)
results.rationale: Official state gazette publishing proposed/adopted administrative regulations, session laws, and public notices. Primary regulatory publication venue for Kansas; freight-relevant regulations (air qual

results.name: Florida Department of Environmental Protection (FDEP) – Division of Air Resource Management
results.rationale: State air-quality regulator with emissions monitoring & permitting authority. Operational freight impact via emissions standards, diesel rules, port air quality. Primary regulatory publisher.

results.name: Rules and Regulations of the State of Georgia (GA SOS)
results.rationale: Georgia SOS Rules & Regulations is canonical primary regulatory archive hosting all state agency rules filed under GA Administrative Procedure Act. Covers sustainability-relevant agencies; indirect fr

results.name: Michigan Legislature – Michigan Compiled Laws (MCL) & Administrative Code
results.rationale: Canonical legislative archive hosting Michigan Compiled Laws, bills, and Public Acts. Primary source for state regulatory content including freight-affecting domains (energy, labor, transport, environ

results.name: Georgia Department of Transportation (GDOT) – Freight Office
results.rationale: State DOT freight planning & infrastructure. Operationally impacts freight movement across modes. Not emissions/sustainability-focused but canonical state transport regulator.

results.name: National Heavy Vehicle Regulator (NHVR)
results.rationale: Australian national heavy vehicle regulator; primary authority on truck safety, fatigue, vehicle standards, emissions-adjacent compliance. Canonical regulator for freight operations.

results.name: Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT)
results.rationale: State DOT with direct freight-operations authority: truck routing, weight/size enforcement, hazmat transport, toll infrastructure. Primary regulator for commercial vehicle movement.

recalibration_recommendation: False-positive rate 15.0% exceeds 5% target. Recommend raising H thresholds by ~5 points (rel ≥ 75, frt ≥ 55) and re-running the spot-check.
